cdc_table_mode.description: For CDC syncs: consolidated (merge changes into one table), cdc_only (only change log), or both.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this external data schema.

incremental_field.description: Column name used to track sync progress for incremental syncs (e.g. "updated_at", "id").

incremental_field_type.description: Data type of the incremental field.

primary_key_columns.description: Column names that form the primary key for deduplication. Set to null to use auto-detected PKs.

sync_frequency.description: How often to sync this table.

sync_time_of_day.description: Time of day to sync in HH:MM:SS format (e.g. "02:00:00"). Set to null to clear.

sync_type.description: Sync strategy: incremental (only new/changed rows), full_refresh (re-import all), append (add-only), or cdc (change data capture).
